policy.reason: These commits are durable, focused-tested engineering evidence. They remain unpromoted and lack the required retail differential, persistence, promoted-binary provenance, and clean-install certification package.

slices.subject: Support persistent Fallout containers
limitations: No whole-corpus container differential
No promoted-binary provenance

slices.subject: Recover Fallout furniture lifecycle state
limitations: No complete furniture/package corpus differential
No promoted-binary provenance

slices.subject: Parse exact Fallout actor value metadata
limitations: Metadata is not complete actor-value evaluation
No mutation/persistence or retail differential

slices.subject: Parse exact Fallout faction records
limitations: Typed records are not reputation/disguise/crime runtime behavior
No persistence or retail differential

slices.subject: Parse exact Fallout NPC runtime state
limitations: Existing compatibility stat shell is not a complete native FNV mechanics model
No mutable player-state persistence or retail differential

slices.subject: Decode Fallout SCDA instruction frames
limitations: Instruction framing is not a complete GECK VM or event scheduler
No opcode-wide retail differential

slices.subject: Parse exact Fallout creature runtime state
limitations: Template-category inheritance remains incomplete
Creature skills/type/base damage and extended AI fields are not consumed
No persistence or retail differential

slices.subject: Resolve native Fallout player state
scope: fourteen skill values and raw offsets
limitations: This is immutable authored/base state, not mutable runtime actor values
No native SPECIAL/skill mechanics consumption or save round-trip
No perks, limbs, appearance, or inventory state

slices.subject: Execute bounded Fallout quest bytecode
limitations: Only two compiled opcodes execute natively
Unsupported opcodes retain temporary whole-SCTX fallback
No general object/dialogue/event VM coverage

slices.subject: Resolve Fallout creature template categories
scope: validated direct and LVLC bridge edges
runtime stats, AI, package, model, movement, scale, and name routing
limitations: 541 LVLC-backed templates still use deterministic level-1 selection
Traits, factions, effects, inventory, and script category consumers remain incomplete
No retail differential or persistence certification

slices.subject: Align Fallout moon regression with retail window
limitations: Test-only correction; no runtime behavior changed
No new live retail differential
No certification credit

slices.subject: Execute core Fallout quest state bytecode
limitations: Only six of 112 observed QUST-stage opcode identities execute natively
3,573 of 5,082 winning-live frames remain outside the recognized command set
Mixed stages still use temporary whole-SCTX fallback
SetStage 0x1039 awaits bounded recursive transaction and cycle semantics
No retail differential or promoted-binary provenance

slices.subject: Persist mutable Fallout player actor values
scope: immutable raw DNAM offset provenance validation
limitations: Single current-value layer is not the retail actor-value modifier stack
No invented retail clamps
Raw skill offsets are preserved but not interpreted
No proxy-health sync because DATA base/max/current semantics remain unproven
No production GetActorValue consumer yet
No retail differential or promoted-binary provenance
